vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by current visual evidence. P1 (Yellow Pot) is empty/soil-only. P2 (Black Pot) shows no signs of Mexican Mint. P3 (Black Pot) is missing the Pothos specimen and the white rabbit anchor is absent in the final frames. P4 (Silver Guest) is not identifiable as a distinct entity.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil, no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P3: Initial state shows a single leaf and white rabbit anchor. Final state shows total loss of plant matter and anchor.
plant_audit.P4: No distinct specimen identified; soil surface appears barren.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp throughout the sequence.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of eggshell fragments in P3/P4 area. Presence of a small electronic component (likely a header pin) in T-4 and T-3, removed by T-2.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Removal of the electronic component from the desk surface.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Progressive wilting and eventual disappearance of the P3 leaf structure.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_CURRENT: Total loss of all biological specimens and the scale anchor (rabbit).
temporal_deltas.what_changed: The biome has transitioned from a populated state to a completely barren, non-biological state.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total collapse. All registered specimens are either dead or have been removed from the environment.
anomalies: Introduction of electronic debris (header pins) in early stages.
Presence of eggshell fragments as a soil amendment/intervention.
Complete removal of the scale anchor (white rabbit).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical environment. Starting from a state where at least one specimen (P3) was present, the sequence documents a rapid decline in plant health followed by the total removal of all biological and decorative elements. The environment is currently a sterile collection of empty pots.
